overall.description: Static cinematic shot of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a video game, showing students in robes dining at long house tables beneath thousands of floating candles in a grand gothic stone hall with high vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with house dining tables and floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint from the center aisle observing students dining in the great hall

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes eating at the Gryffindor table, occasionally looking down at food
student in dark robes seated at the left house table, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended by magic illuminating the hall from above
red and gold banner with lion crest hanging on the front of the central table
long wooden house table filled with students and food platters
long wooden house table with students dining
tall gothic arched windows with stone tracery allowing natural light
high vaulted ceiling with magical floating candles

segments.scene_description: A stationary view down the central aisle of a grand gothic dining hall filled with students in robes seated at long house tables. Floating candles illuminate the vaulted stone ceiling above, while a red Gryffindor banner hangs prominently on the nearest table. Students eat and converse in the ambient warmth of the candlelit hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, cinematic gaze down the central aisle of a grand gothic dining hall, capturing a scene of academic tradition and ambient warmth. It begins with a focused view of students in robes seated at long house tables, where the soft glow of thousands of floating candles illuminates the high vaulted stone ceiling. As the eye travels deeper into the space, the prominence of a red Gryffindor banner on the nearest table anchors the perspective amidst the bustling activity of dining students. The scene remains poised in this atmospheric stillness, emphasizing the scale of the architecture and the flickering light that fills the vast hall.
